Power: momentary values in W. Meter read: Power: momentary values in W. Meter reading: cumulative values in kWh.
PV + consumption OR grid import + feed-i: PV + consumption OR grid import + feed-in of a bidirectional meter.
A single datapoint carrying import and f: A single datapoint carrying import and feed-in via its sign (e.g. OBIS 16.7.0 total active power).
Most meters (OBIS 16.7.0) use positive =: Most meters (OBIS 16.7.0) use positive = grid import, negative = feed-in.
Polling reads the momentary value once p: Polling reads the momentary value once per interval. Event-based subscribes to the source datapoints and integrates every change time-weighted (more accurate with fast-changing meters).
Polling: sampling AND accounting interva: Polling: sampling AND accounting interval. Event-based: accounting interval only (accuracy comes from the events); states/charts are updated at this pace.

Continuous self-consumption of the stora: Continuous self-consumption of the storage system (battery management etc.). Covered from the battery while charged, otherwise from the grid.
Assumed annual increase of the electrici: Assumed annual increase of the electricity price; used for the amortization estimate and forecast (0 = linear).
The trend charts need time series. Enabl: The trend charts need time series. Enable history logging (adapter 'history', 'sql' or 'influxdb') on this instance's live.* datapoints (grid modes: live.gridNetOrigW, live.gridNetSimW, live.batteryPowerW; PV mode: live.pvW, live.consumptionW, live.directUseW) and on battery.soc.percent. For the monthly view additionally on economics.savingsTotal.eur. Without logging the evaluation only shows current values.
Fixed value or a datapoint with a dynami: Fixed value or a datapoint with a dynamic tariff (e.g. Tibber).
e.g. Tibber 'CurrentPrice.total'. If it: e.g. Tibber 'CurrentPrice.total'. If it delivers no numeric value, the fixed value is used as fallback.
Also used as fallback when the price dat: Also used as fallback when the price datapoint is unavailable.
